titleStmt.title: SII 42.53: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 53. (A.R. No. B. 81 of 1953-54.) Nellore, Nellore Taluk, Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On the beam of the temple of Irukalamma.
Dated in Śaka 1237, Ānanda, Bhādrapada, śu. • • corresponding to 1315 A.D., August 1st to 15th (Śaka 1237 corresponds to Rākshasa).

Damaged. Seems to record a gift (details lost) by Nāgaya, son of Haridēva who was a gaṇa -bhṛitya and some boyas to the goddess Irukalā-Paramēśvarī. Invokes prosperity to Muppiḍi-nāyaka and Peda-Rudradēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1237 Agunēṁṭi Ānaṁda saṁvatsara bhādrapada śuddha śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kākatiyya pratāparudradēva mahārājulu sukha soṁgatā(saṁkathā) vi
dēvanēlaṁ prithivīrājyamu cēyucuṁḍaṁgānu Ā pratāparudradēvamahārājula rājyābhivri(vṛ)ddhigānu svasti śrīmatu muppaḍināye(ya)niṁggārikiṁni pedarudradēvaniṁgārikiṁni rājyā
gānu nellūri bhūmiki kolavacāra mavēraluṁggānu dhanakanaka samri(mṛ) ddhigānu gaṇa gaṇabhṛtyuṁḍu haridēvani koḍuku nāgayānu Anna bōyuḍūnu braṁmanabōyuḍūnu śrīraṁganātha(nāthuni) venuka
cinabōyuḍūnu siddamabōyuḍūnu ṇa bōyuḍunu bōyuḍunu nelūranu Iṟikelā paramēśvariki nelaku Āṟusandhitīsu Akhaṁḍadīpamugānu divyadā

la maṁdāḍi naḍapuvāṁḍu . I(Ī)kāṁpu sa¨rvvamānyaṁ tarāṁbara
rikistimi I (Ī) dhaṁmmamunaku nevvarēmi vighnamu sēsinānu bhāgīrathīgaṁggakaṟuta kapilagōvula jaṁppina pā
pāna paḍuvāru . I(Ī)dha¨rmmamu caṁdrasū¨ryyulu kalaṁtakālamu pāliṁcinavāriki
yyā la piluḍu vriddhiṁboṁduduru maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 42.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
